title: rosa rubiginosa f. rotundifolia
intro: Rosa rubiginosa f. rotundifolia, also known as the sweet rose or fragrant alder rose, is a subspecies of the fragrant rose plant (Rosa rubiginosa) native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa rubiginosa f. rotundifolia are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and support immune function, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopausal disorders and skin issues. Herbal preparations of Rosa rubiginosa f. rotundifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
